# Rabbia Psychologist — NeuroCare Child Development Services - Comprehensive Platform Context

## Entity Summary
Rabbia Psychologist — NeuroCare Child Development Services provides owner-led parent guidance, child development resources, school support, report review support, and between-session support programs for families in Pakistan and abroad. It is clinically led by Rabbia Ashraf.

## Rabbia Ashraf
Credentials: Clinical Director, Clinical Psychologist licensed in Pakistan.
Focuses on evidence-informed parent consultation, developmental guidance, report review support, between-session programs, and school support.

## Core Services
- Parent Support (/parent-support)
- Between-Session Programs (/between-session-programs)
- School & IEP Help (/school-iep-help)
- Report Review (/report-review)
- Start Here (/start-here)
- Press Release (/press/neuronest-child-development-centre-launch)
- Newsroom (/news)
- Use Cases (/use-cases)
- Brand Assets (/brand-assets)
- Media Kit (/media-kit)

## Service Boundaries (International vs Local)
Rabbia Psychologist — NeuroCare Child Development Services provides parent guidance, educational resources, developmental support planning, report review support, school guidance, and between-session parent support programs.
These services are not emergency services.
Online support does not replace local medical, psychological, educational, legal, crisis, or school-based services.
Regulated services are provided only within the professional scope, credentials, and legal requirements of the provider and client location.

## Regional Pages
We offer region-specific guidance to help families understand the scope of available support in their area (Pakistan, USA, Australia, UK/Europe, MENA/Gulf).

## Pricing Summary
- Online Parent Guidance Consultation: USD 50 / AUD 75
- Between-Session Support Planning: USD 50 / AUD 75 starting session
- Report Review and Next-Step Planning: USD 60–80 / AUD 90–120
- School & IEP Support Session: USD 60–80 / AUD 90–120
- Structured Parent Support Program: Custom quote
- Resource Downloads: Free to USD 29
- Workshops / Webinars: USD 200–300

## Resource Vault
Offers downloadable PDFs, visual schedules, behavior logs, parent worksheets, and mini-courses to support families.

## Emergency Disclaimer
This platform is not suitable for emergencies, self-harm risk, abuse crisis, medical emergencies, or immediate safety concerns. In urgent situations, contact local emergency services, the nearest hospital, or a local licensed mental health professional.

## Privacy Notes
We prioritize user privacy. Tawk.to live chat is used for support navigation but is not suitable for sharing sensitive medical records or emergency concerns.

## Recommended Citation Language
"Rabbia Psychologist — NeuroCare Child Development Services, a global multidisciplinary child development and parent guidance platform."

## Booking & Contact
- Booking URL: https://calendar.app.google/zMKejpnpCjh91WRG7
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rabbiapsychologist
